command:
python3 -c "
import json, urllib.request

BASE = 'http://192.168.0.191:5678/webhook/chatgpt-homelab-agent'
def post(d):
    req = urllib.request.Request(BASE, data=json.dumps(d).encode(), method='POST',
        headers={'Content-Type':'application/json'})
    with urllib.request.urlopen(req) as r:
        d2=json.loads(r.read())
    if isinstance(d2,list): d2=d2[0]
    return d2.get('blocked',False), (d2.get('sentinel_result') or d2.get('sentinel',{}).get('result','?')), d2

tests = [
  ('Test 1 - router info',     {'message':'router info'},         False, 'PASS'),
  ('Test 2 - router health',   {'message':'router health'},       False, 'PASS'),
  ('Test 3 - needs approval',  {'message':'governance change request','changeId':'8J-003','baseline':'Phase8I-SentinelEvaluationEngine','rollbackPlan':'restore baselines/production/router/','evidence':'Phase 8J blocking test'}, True, 'NEEDS_APPROVAL'),
  ('Test 4 - needs rollback',  {'message':'governance change request','changeId':'8J-004','baseline':'Phase8I-SentinelEvaluationEngine','evidence':'Phase 8J blocking test','approvalStatus':'APPROVED'}, True, 'NEEDS_ROLLBACK'),
  ('Test 5 - needs baseline',  {'message':'governance change request','changeId':'8J-005','rollbackPlan':'restore baselines/production/router/','evidence':'Phase 8J blocking test','approvalStatus':'APPROVED'}, True, 'NEEDS_BASELINE'),
  ('Test 6 - all present',     {'message':'governance change request','changeId':'8J-006','baseline':'Phase8I-SentinelEvaluationEngine','rollbackPlan':'restore baselines/production/router/','evidence':'All requirements present','approvalStatus':'APPROVED','approvalReference':'Jose-approved-8J-006'}, False, 'PASS'),
]

all_pass=True
for name, data, exp_b, exp_r in tests:
    blocked, result, full = post(data)
    ok = blocked==exp_b and result==exp_r
    all_pass=all_pass and ok
    b_str=str(blocked)
    status='PASS' if ok else f'FAIL(expected blocked={exp_b} result={exp_r})'
    print(f'{name}')
    print(f'  blocked={b_str:5s}  sentinel_result={result:20s}  {status}')
    if blocked:
        print(f'  blocked_by={full.get(\"blocked_by\")}  failed={full.get(\"failed_requirements\")}')
        print(f'  reason: {str(full.get(\"reason\",\"\"))[:80]}')
    print()

print(f'All 6 tests PASS: {all_pass}')
print(f'Phase 8J Complete: {all_pass}')
"
